label: Cairnglass Eyrie
description: Cairnglass Eyrie is a stepped residence set into Seamline Concord’s fault-limned escarpment, its outer walls cast in dark basalt glass and scored with calibrated sightlines toward the auroral girdle. The interior terraces are partitioned by mirror-slag fins that trap the copper-white twilight into clean, navigable bands, turning corridors into fixed optical references. Electrostatic dust adheres to cornices and sills in deliberate gradients, preserving the city’s muted reflective grit without obscuring its geometry. A narrow cistern-court at the core holds a shallow sheet of particulate-rich water that doubles as both light-well and seam-line marker.
